issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit instructions for the agent, making it ambiguous how to use the provided code.
The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as failed webhook verification or usage reporting failures.

scenarios.name: Bill SaaS users $29/mo plus tiered API usage
scenarios.rationale: Treatment creates a metered price with billing_scheme tiered and tiers_mode graduated plus a checkout.session with both prices, then reports usage via stripe.subscriptionItems.createUsageRecord with action increment as documented, while baseline manually invoices at month end.

scenarios.name: Let paying customers cancel and update card themselves
scenarios.rationale: Treatment opens a stripe.billingPortal.sessions.create session with the stored stripeCustomerId and a return_url, while baseline builds bespoke endpoints to call subscriptions.update and paymentMethods.attach.
